front: Story Quilt: Ringgold's first story quilt reimagines Aunt Jemima as a successful Harlem restaurateur named Willa Marie Simone, who opens a restaurant with her husband Big Rufus
back: Who's Afraid of Aunt Jemima? (1983) (Faith Ringgold)

front: Story Quilt: 26 portraits with brown and yellow backgrounds surround narrative text squares; 56 squares total, the storyline occupying 7
back: Who's Afraid of Aunt Jemima? (1983) (Faith Ringgold)

front: Story Quilt: A girl named Cassie Louise Lightfoot flies through the night sky above the George Washington Bridge while her family dines on a Harlem rooftop
Story Quilt: Inspired by African American folktales about flying; the same tradition that inspired Toni Morrison's Song of Solomon
Story Quilt: Depicts a black woman and her daughters leaping / dancing in front of the Mona Lisa; part of The French Collection, Part I
work: The French Collection, Part I (including Dancing at the Louvre and Picasso's Studio)

front: Story Quilt: Willa Marie Simone poses as a model for Les Demoiselles d'Avignon in this quilt where Picasso can be seen painting
work: The French Collection, Part I (including Dancing at the Louvre and Picasso's Studio)

front: Painting: 20th work of the American People Series, subtitled 'Die' — a bloody scene with a huddled white boy and black girl at center, cocktail dresses, suits, guns; inspired by Picasso's Guernica and the 1967 race riots
Painting: The Flag Is Bleeding — Stars and Stripes interwoven with images of a black man and a white couple; inspired by Jasper Johns's flag paintings
Sculpture/Mask: Witch series uses raffia as decorative hair, including Women's Liberation Talking Mask; Family of Woman Mask series includes a life-sized statue of Wilt Chamberlain
work: Witch Series / Family of Women Masks

front: Artist: Was inspired to work in the quilt medium after visiting the Rijksmuseum and seeing Nepali thangkas there
Story Quilt: A triptych with sections titled 'Accident,' 'Fire,' and 'Homecoming'
work: Change 2 / General Story Quilts and Medium

front: Story Quilt: Depicts a black woman in a pink swimsuit with a dark shadow; subtitled 'Over 100 Pound Weight Loss Performance'
work: Change 2 / General Story Quilts and Medium

front: Artist: Illustrated a children's book based on Gwendolyn Brooks's poetry set in a neighborhood that also titled Brooks's first poetry collection
